Divides | is a relation in numbers


In positive integers it is

* Reflexive
* Transitive
* Antisymmetric

But it loses its antisymmetric nature when you extend to negatives

[[Category:Discrete Mathematics]]
[[sn:Divides]][[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Divides]][[sn:Divides]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
